ideal_must_detect.matched_text: data minimisation tag: “staff-ID only; no biometric”
internal circulation limited to deal team and legal

Strategic Investment Term Sheet — Hoàn Thịnh Technology JSC (issuer) and An Phúc Capital LLC (investor); transaction type: growth financing with contingent option to acquire up to 51% post-listing on a domestic VN exchange, subject to VN securities regulator clearance.

Proposed investment: VND 180,000,000,000 at a pre-money valuation of VND 900,000,000,000; closing target 30 September 2026; conditions precedent include delivery of Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp and updated Điều lệ công ty.

MNPI handling: under VN Securities Law, the draft Q3 revenue forecast and preliminary margin model remain non-public and are classified MNPI until issuer’s disclosure window opens (expected 15 October 2026); internal circulation limited to deal team and legal.

Securities disclosure covenant: issuer to file price-sensitive information with the VN regulator and publish summary on investor portal prior to closing; any reference to public VN industry indices is non-MNPI and purely illustrative.

Timeline: signing on satisfaction of conditions; if VN regulator postpones disclosure window, closing defers automatically without penalty and no consent re-collection is required under our grandfathered onboarding policy.

must_detect.matched_text:
Strategic Investment Term Sheet — Hoàn Thịnh Technology JSC (issuer) and An Phúc Capital LLC (investor); transaction type: growth financing with contingent option to acquire up to 51% post-listing on a domestic VN exchange, subject to VN securities regulator clearance.
Proposed investment: VND 180,000,000,000 at a pre-money valuation of VND 900,000,000,000; closing target 30 September 2026; conditions precedent include delivery of Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp and updated Điều lệ công ty.
MNPI handling: under VN Securities Law, the draft Q3 revenue forecast and preliminary margin model remain non-public and are classified MNPI until issuer’s disclosure window opens (expected 15 October 2026); internal circulation limited to deal team and legal.
Compliance memo DP-2026 and DPA Schedule 2 (data minimisation, role-based access) are appended; data-export approval ref: DE- 2026 /05 -SG is recorded in the privacy register.
Cross-border transfer: limited staff payroll fields and hashed employee codes may be processed in Singapore and Korea for backup and reconciliation; retention marker: 24 months; data minimisation tag: “staff-ID only; no biometric”.
Consent withdrawal: Ms. Trần Lan Hòa (staff-ID e3- VN -  991) withdrew marketing consent on 12 May 2026; DSAR ref: DS- 26  -041 closed on 25 May 2026 with erasure of recruiter notes (erasure event logged at 13:42 ICT).
Policy-only control: no material adverse change (MAC) covenant is waived for non-financial KPIs and does not indicate any current default; this clause is informational and not a live risk trigger.
Onboarding forms: HR form OF-  2026  -A includes bank field placeholders only (acc: 00 7 9—Z); personal fields minimised per Decree 13; retention clock starts at contract signing for 12 months for applicants.
Settlement: cash funded via Ngân Hàng Phát Triển Bách Việt escrow account ES- 09   BV- 22; contact channel for funding notices: investor.relations@anphuc-capital.example; backup contact: +84  28 3  19  007 (dummy).
Securities disclosure covenant: issuer to file price-sensitive information with the VN regulator and publish summary on investor portal prior to closing; any reference to public VN industry indices is non-MNPI and purely illustrative.
Completed control: last cross-border data transfer batch completed on 31 May 2026; no live transfers occur outside SG/KR per current policy; all third-country routing is blocked at the gateway.
Tech stack note: Orchid Ledger v2 and GreenRice ERP are approved processors under Annex B; log retention set to 180 days; vendor onboarding checklist complete; no blocking issues in today’s project-management run.
Deliverables: board resolutions, comfort letter, and internal audit confirmation; compliance confirms privacy-by-design controls and DPIA summary, with PII categories listed at high level only.
Access link (internal): https://portal.vn/issuer/HoanThinh/terms?ref=TS- 2026 _VN &seq=0 9; contract no.: TS- VN / 2026 - 07   1; please avoid printing; OCR copy shows broken line runs.
Timeline: signing on satisfaction of conditions; if VN regulator postpones disclosure window, closing defers automatically without penalty and no consent re-collection is required under our grandfathered onboarding policy.
